en_title: John Blanche, the Legendary Illustrator Who Defined the Look of Warhammer 40,000, Has Died
cn_title: 战锤40K视觉奠基人John Blanche逝世
subtitle: 黑暗美学的缔造者
opus_summary: 传奇插画师John Blanche去世，其黑暗美学定义了《战锤40K》的视觉风格。他创作的帝皇黄金王座图成为系列标志，第二版盒装封面至今影响深远。Games Workshop在即将发售的第11版中致敬其经典画作。Blanche于2023年退休，享年不详。

paragraphs.en: John Blanche, the legendary illustrator whose art helped define the grimdark Warhammer 40,000 setting, has died.
paragraphs.cn: 传奇插画师John Blanche去世，他的艺术定义了《战锤40K》那黑暗绝望的「黑暗绝望」世界观。

paragraphs.en: A Facebook post from Trish Carden Miniatures and Design brought news that Blanche passed away earlier this week.
paragraphs.cn: Trish Carden Miniatures and Design在Facebook上发布消息，称Blanche于本周早些时候离世。

paragraphs.en: “John was an inspirational artist, devoted to his family and a good friend to many,” the post reads. “Always generous with his time and knowledge, he was very well loved by all who knew and worked with him. He’ll be hugely missed. The world of Warhammer was brought to life by his vision of the grimdark setting and I know his art meant a lot to so many of you. He leaves behind an enormous legacy that has enriched many people’s lives.”
paragraphs.cn: 「John是一位富有灵感的艺术家，他忠于家庭，也是许多人的挚友，」帖子写道，「他总是慷慨地分享自己的时间和知识，所有认识他、与他共事过的人都非常爱戴他。我们会深深怀念他。战锤世界因他对黑暗绝望设定的构想而栩栩如生，我知道他的艺术对你们许多人意义重大。他留下了巨大的遗产，丰富了许多人的生活。」

paragraphs.en: Blanche is perhaps best known for his art depicting the Emperor sat upon the Golden Throne, an image seared into the minds of Warhammer 40,000 fans and one that helped establish what we think of as the Emperor’s current status in the setting.
paragraphs.cn: Blanche最著名的作品或许是描绘帝皇端坐于黄金王座上的画作，这幅图像深深烙印在《战锤40K》粉丝的脑海中，并帮助确立了帝皇在该设定中的当前地位。

paragraphs.en: , revealing his art was never meant to depict the "real" Emperor, rather it was meant to show an image of the Emperor pilgrims who had made their way to Terra (earth in the 41st millenium) would gaze upon as they arrived at what they thought was the God of Mankind's throne. The "real" Emperor, Blanche believed, is kept in a glass tube behind this facade, connected to all kinds of machinery. Blanche's artwork is used as a reference point even now, decades after he painted it, amid debates about the Emperor in the current setting .
paragraphs.cn: Blanche曾透露，他的画作从未打算描绘「真实」的帝皇，而是展现朝圣者抵达泰拉（41千年的地球）后，凝视他们心目中人类之神王座时所看到的景象。Blanche认为，「真实」的帝皇被保存在这个表象背后的玻璃管中，连接着各种机械。即使在画作完成数十年后的今天，Blanche的作品仍被用作参考，用于讨论当前设定中的帝皇。

paragraphs.en: Blanche also painted the iconic art for the second edition Warhammer 40,000 boxed set, which saw the Blood Angels thrust to the forefront. This art is so beloved that Games Workshop leaned on it for the art of the Warhmmer 40,000 11th Edition box set, due out later this month.
paragraphs.cn: Blanche还为《战锤40K》第二版盒装套装绘制了标志性封面，让圣血天使成为焦点。这幅画作深受喜爱，以至于Games Workshop在即将于本月晚些时候发售的《战锤40K》第11版盒装套装中，也借鉴了它的艺术风格。

paragraphs.en: Blanche retired from Games Workshop in 2023 after an association with the tabletop games company that began in the seventies, and had suffered from ill health in recent years.
paragraphs.cn: Blanche于2023年从Games Workshop退休，他与这家桌面游戏公司的合作始于上世纪70年代，近年来身体状况一直不佳。

paragraphs.en: "So sorry to hear about the passing of icon and legend, John Blanche," tweeted author Justin Hill. "There's not a book I write, where I don't go back to some of the brilliant concept art he produced, that did so much to shape the look of the Grim Dark future."
paragraphs.cn: 「听闻偶像与传奇John Blanche去世，深感悲痛，」作者Justin Hill在推特上写道，「我写的每一本书，都会回顾他创作的那些精彩概念艺术，它们为塑造黑暗未来的面貌做出了巨大贡献。」

paragraphs.en: "John Blanche, the grandfather of the Grimdark style has passed away," painting social media account FireFlyPaints said . "He is one of the largest influences in my painting style. The Bell of Lost Souls tolls once more. Prayers to his Family and Friends."
paragraphs.cn: 「John Blanche，黑暗绝望风格的奠基人，已经离世，」涂装社交媒体账号FireFlyPaints表示，「他对我绘画风格的影响最大。失魂之钟再次敲响。为他的家人和朋友祈祷。」

paragraphs.en: "Just heard John Blanche passed away. His art was THE reason I first got into WH40K 20+ years ago," another fan said . "Through it I not only discovered tons of other great artists, but it also heavily influenced my own direction. Rest in Power John & thanks for all you’ve given to this world."
paragraphs.cn: 「刚听说John Blanche去世了。20多年前，正是他的艺术让我第一次入坑《战锤40K》，」另一位粉丝说道，「通过他的作品，我不仅发现了许多其他伟大的艺术家，也深深影响了我自己的方向。安息吧John，感谢你为这个世界付出的一切。」

paragraphs.en: "Incredibly sad to hear the legendary John Blanche has passed," writer Gary Moloney added . "An artist whose work came to define an entire sub-genre of SFF. Spawning a legion of creators to build their own characters and worlds (or even just squat in a tiny corner of his). Ní bheidh a leithéid arís ann."
paragraphs.cn: 「听闻传奇John Blanche去世，无比悲痛，」作家Gary Moloney补充道，「他的作品定义了整个科幻奇幻亚类型。催生了无数创作者去构建自己的角色和世界（或者只是在他作品的小小角落里安家）。Ní bheidh a leithéid arís ann（盖尔语：再无来者）。」

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。在Twitter上关注他：@wyp100。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
